description: Gold questions for retrieval evaluation. Each question maps to the source document that contains the answer. Many are phrased with synonyms/paraphrases (not the document's keywords) to test semantic vs lexical retrieval.

items.question: How do I change my credentials without downtime?
What is the recommended way for machine-to-machine calls?
How long is a login token valid before I must refresh it?
What happens if I go over my included monthly usage?
How can I stop being charged extra once I hit a spending limit?
Which tier gives me a dedicated success manager?
What error do I get when I send too many requests too fast?
How should my client recover after being throttled?
How do I honour a right-to-be-forgotten request?
How long until deleted records disappear from backups?
Who gets notified first when there is a total outage?
How do we switch traffic to the backup region?
How is information protected while stored on disk?
Can staff sign in with their company identity provider?
How do I confirm a webhook really came from you?
How does the client library avoid duplicate writes on retry?
How do I page through a long list of results?
